query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN expires_at > NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_expired,
  SUM(CASE WHEN expires_at <= NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expired
FROM scraped_projects;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN expires_at > NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_expired,
  SUM(CASE WHEN expires_at <= NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expired
FROM scraped_projects;
